name: Chinese Cabbage & Cilantro Slaw
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cabbage, red pepper, green onions, and cilantro in a large bowl. Toss and set aside.
2. In a small bowl, combine lime juice, oil, salt, red pepper flakes, and garlic. Stir with a wire whisk until well blended.
3. Pour the lime mixture over the cabbage mixture and toss well. Cover and chill thoroughly. (Fat 4.8, Cholesterol 0.)
